_comment: Offline fixture for the L4 claim-graph (Phase 5 / I-cred-005). LAW VI: no live data, no network. Every row is a hand-authored evidence-row shaped like the live pipeline (evidence_id + direct_quote + source_url + tier). Cases cover: equivalence clustering (conservative-singleton), non-clinical field-agnostic coverage, numeric contradiction edges, qualitative present-vs-absent edges, and the conservative-singleton never-over-merge invariant.

equivalent_clinical_numeric._label: Two rows assert the SAME clinical finding (semaglutide 14.9% weight loss) from two independent hosts. They MUST share one claim_cluster_id.

rows.direct_quote: In the trial, semaglutide achieved 14.9% weight loss at week 68.
Semaglutide produced 14.9% weight loss at week 68 in the pivotal study.

distinct_clinical_numeric._label: Two rows assert DIFFERENT findings on the same predicate (semaglutide 14.9% vs tirzepatide 22.5%). Distinct subjects/values MUST NOT over-merge: two separate clusters.

rows.direct_quote: Semaglutide achieved 14.9% weight loss at week 68.
Tirzepatide achieved 22.5% weight loss at week 72.

non_clinical_numeric._label: Field-agnostic coverage: non-clinical numeric rows (GDP growth, emissions). finding_dedup would return NOTHING here; the claim-graph must still produce one atomic claim per row (raw fallback) so nothing is dropped.

rows.direct_quote: The economy posted 3.1% GDP growth in the fourth quarter.
National emissions fell by 7% relative to the 2005 baseline.

numeric_contradiction._label: Two sources contradict on semaglutide weight loss (14.9% vs 17.4%) at the same dose-less predicate. RECALL-FIRST: a numeric contradiction edge MUST be emitted.

rows.direct_quote: Semaglutide achieved 14.9% weight loss from baseline.
Semaglutide achieved 17.4% weight loss from baseline.

qualitative_present_vs_absent._label: Present-vs-absent clinical-safety conflict (drug X contraindicated in pregnancy vs not contraindicated). NO number — invisible to the numeric path. RECALL-FIRST: a qualitative conflict edge MUST be emitted, never silently dropped.

rows.direct_quote: Warfarin has no contraindication in pregnancy and may be used.

no_conflict_corpus._label: A corpus with no contradictions: two agreeing rows. Must produce zero contradiction edges (no fabricated conflict).

rows.direct_quote: Metformin is first-line therapy for type 2 diabetes.
Metformin remains the recommended first-line therapy for type 2 diabetes.
